title: balsamorhiza floccosa
intro: Balsamorhiza floccosa, also known as woolly balsamroot, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Balsamorhiza floccosa include its ability to protect against infections, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
